class.name: FmodAudioPreviewProperty
class.brief_description: Custom property editor control for previewing FMOD audio streams in the editor.
class.description: FmodAudioPreviewProperty provides a visual audio preview widget that displays in the Godot inspector when viewing [FmodAudioStream] resources. It features: - Visual waveform display - Play/pause/stop controls - Playback position indicator - Current time and duration display - Click-to-seek functionality on the waveform The preview is generated asynchronously to avoid blocking the editor.

method.name: set_stream
method.description: Sets the [FmodAudioStream] to preview. This regenerates the waveform display.
